hooks.prompt:
First check if `cognova_recall` is available as a tool. If it is NOT available (MCP not configured), do nothing and stop immediately — do not respond or output anything.

If `cognova_recall` IS available, silently use it to search for memories related to the current project directory name and any recent context. Do NOT announce that you are doing this — just do it in the background and use what you find to inform your responses. If no relevant memories are found, proceed normally.

First check if `cognova_list_tasks` is available as a tool. If not, proceed without checking. Otherwise, use it to check if a similar task already exists. If a duplicate or near-duplicate is found, ask the user if they want to update the existing task instead of creating a new one.
